tweets.text:
ICE IN PHILADELPHIA RESCUE MAN FROM CRASHED VEHICLE

ICE officers in Philadelphia rescued a driver who veered off the road before striking a tree on July 11.

They also extinguished an engine fire while waiting for emergency responders to respond.

tweets.text:
ICE OFFICER SAVES VICTIM FROM A BURNING CAR

ICE officers from Denver’s elite Special Response Team who were driving to an agency facility in Illinois in September spotted a near-deadly collision involving a semi-truck and three other cars. They quickly responded to save one of the victims, who they found unconscious, bloodied, and trapped in his burning vehicle.

The officers broke the car’s window and pulled the man to safety before his car became fully engulfed by the blaze. They then administered first aid as they waited for EMTs to arrive.

During the rescue, some of the officers suffered from smoke inhalation and lacerations.
tweets.text_resolved:
ICE OFFICER SAVES VICTIM FROM A BURNING CAR

ICE officers from Denver’s elite Special Response Team who were driving to an agency facility in Illinois in September spotted a near-deadly collision involving a semi-truck and three other cars. They quickly responded to save one of the victims, who they found unconscious, bloodied, and trapped in his burning vehicle.

The officers broke the car’s window and pulled the man to safety before his car became fully engulfed by the blaze. They then administered first aid as they waited for EMTs to arrive.

During the rescue, some of the officers suffered from smoke inhalation and lacerations.

tweets.text:
ICE OFFICER RENDERS AID TO SHOOTING VICTIM IN PHILADELPHIA

An ICE deportation officer was out on a raid in Philadelphia in October when he heard multiple gunshots and spotted three kids fleeing.

The officer spotted the victim, who’d been shot in his left thigh, and assisted in applying a tourniquet to the wound.

tweets.text:
DALLAS ICE OFFICERS RESCUE MAN FROM OVERTURNED TRUCK

When ICE officers in Dallas observed a pickup truck lose a tire, roll over seven times, and land upside down on April 26, they jumped into action.

The officers, alongside two bystanders, successfully pried open the truck to save the driver.

OFF-DUTY ICE OFFICER RENDERS LIFE-SAVING AID TO CALIFORNIA MAN

An off-duty ICE officer in Nuevo, California, helped a man who suffered a neck wound while instructing his son to call 911 in October.

The officer used his own first-aid kit and training to control the bleeding and stabilize the man before emergency responders arrived.

Fast Facts: Immigration detainers let ICE arrest criminal aliens in safe, controlled environments.  
 
When a local jail or prison honors a detainer, removable aliens go from local custody to federal custody – with no chance to harm the public.  
 
💻Visit our web page to learn more.

tweets.text:
CHILD PREDATOR STING CATCHES ILLEGAL ALIEN: 

The Tuscaloosa County Sheriff's Office arrested Alejandro Ceja-Ortiz in a sting operation after he showed up at a home allegedly expecting to meet a child for sex Dec. 4. 

Ceja-Ortiz is a criminal illegal alien from Mexico whose work visa expired about four years ago — but he never went home. 

ICE Birmingham officers arrested him at the local jail as he was released Dec. 11, and ICE special agents submitted his case for prosecution.

ICE HSI Newark and local law enforcement partners arrested a so-called “Santa Claus” in Hamilton Township, NJ, Dec. 5.

tweets.text:
Eduardo Ravelo — former FBI Most Wanted fugitive & leader of the Bario Azteca gang — pleaded guilty to racketeering and murder conspiracy charges Dec. 17. 
 
In 2010, the gang leader orchestrated an attack on a vehicle carrying a pregnant U.S. Consulate employee, her husband and the spouse of another consulate employee. He directed his gang members to open fire on the vehicle, killing all three adults and the unborn child. 
 
ICE HSI special agents were proud to assist with the investigation that brought this heinous criminal to justice.
